dataList.dlg:
- Lessee here... Popcorn, check. Nachos... check.
- Papa! Coke as usual? No ice?
- Ya got that right, Kiddo! Well, all seems to be in order... Then let's get this show on the road!

- Ooh~ Loading... Loading... and clash! - Hmm~ Papa wouldn't waste time sizin' 'em up. I'd rush right in and BAM! Smash its head to strawberry jam. - Huh? The head, Papa? That's the wrong strat! You told me last time to grab a greatsword and donut its "Body"—that's the gimmick!

- It's here! The crisis arc! "At last, the long-dreaded doom descends! Will they prevail?!"
- Don't get too excited yet, Kiddo. These shows sometimes jump straight from the crisis arc to the downer ending without ever getting to the climax.
Hmm... Weird, the games I played always had healer characters... Don't these guys have one? When shit happens, you gotta spam heal first before anything else.

- Ooh! Stagger window! Okay, full burst & ult spam, go!
- Hold your horses, Kiddo. That's a fighting game strat.
- Huh? Hang on. Is this supposed to be played like a strategy game or something?
- Right on. Use this window to beat 'em all down to low HP.
Bruh... zero brain cells. There's always that one frickin' troll in comic books—that guy who should be playing it safe, but keeps yapping and clip farming in front until they get folded.

- Bwahahaha! Got'em! Whaddaya think, Kiddo? Is Papa playin' on a pro-gamer level or what?
- Hmm? Uh, but you're not the one who's piloting their account, Papa...
Really? Getting yourselves killed already...? Hey, somebody should go check who's on the controller 'cuz they got no idea what they're doing!
Ooh... The tension's aboutta pop off! Time for the hero to show up and pull a badass self-sacrifice move, cuz that'd be absolutely peak!

- What's wrong? Is this boring you, Kiddo?
- Well... It gets old when every fight's a curbstomp.
- Ya don't like OP protags...? That's it! We're marathoning the classics of power fantasy tonight!
- Uh... But I... sure.

- A tap from Papa's OP sword, and they'd all be toast... - Still holding strong, even though they're shaking in their boots... That's some commendable grit. - There is a trope for chars like 'em—A bit of downtime, and they'll be like "this is our last shot!!" and delete the boss.

- *crunch* *munch* Oooh...!!
- *glug* *glug* Phoo...
- Hey, Papa, d'you think—
- Shush, Kiddo. Important scene comin' up.
Here it comes...! The party-wipe ult phase!

- The hell are they doing back there—tryna lure me out, huh? *huff* I am the Matthias! Did you really think I'd fall for that lousy trap? - Like I said, Papa... You're not even the one piloting their account...
Badass! That one deserves a "well done!" sticker.

- W-what was—what even...? What the heck was that supposed to—ah, well...
- Some new hybrid genre...? Action comedy...?

- Hm, well... Good work, I guess.
- You sound so meh about it. Did you get tired of this new one again, Papa?
- Papa's not a fan of forced strat fights, y'know~ *sigh* Brute strength versus brute strength! Now that's a real fight!

- Eh? You sure that's the right strat...?
- Right, wrong, who cares? Everything's a DPS check if ya got 'nuff brute force!
- .......

- Papa! D'you think those guys might be Family, too?
- Eh...? I don't... think so? Why do ya ask, Kiddo?
- 'Cause they suddenly look hella juiced up... Like they activated their tats like we do or something. Weird...

- They're mopin' around like a monster with debuffs stacked up all the way to heaven... Hey, Kiddo. Remember what Papa always tells ya to do when we run raids together?
- Hehe... Blow the full burst rotation before the buff window wears off!!

- These guys are totally sus. Right, Papa?
- Maybe they're setting up the... whatchamacallit's gun? Hm. I don't know if I like fussy little tricks like that.

- Ya just gotta—
- Grit! It's all about grit!
- Hell yeah, that's my girl! Exactly—Ya just gotta grit your teeth and tough it out!
Huh. Unboxed a layer, did they? These ones get weaker the more layers you remove, I guess.

- They should've nuked that part ages ago. Man, I hate filler...
- Remember, Kiddo? It's the boring "filler episodes" that make or break the dramatic climax of any story! Setup and payoff, get what I mean?
- Papa... Aren't filler episodes a bit old-school...?

- Damn... That's one hell of a move!
- Uh, Papa...? It's our guys who took the hit.
- Whaddayamean "our guys," Kiddo? There's not even a single "our guy" in there! It's just badass, that's all... Damn...
Yeah, sometimes you get cooked, but that's only temporary. Big deal... the heroes take a beating early in the fight—to lock in the next moment and hit the comeback arc! That's, like, a classic!
Haha! Bullseye! How's that, Kiddo?!

- See that, Kiddo? Now that's what I call a slasher—a real deal thriller! Gimme blood! Gimme gore! Gimme action! - I mean, okay, but shouldn't there be more to the story than just hack-and-slash? Badass Fixer lore, maybe... Eeek!! - ... We don't need to have more "media lessons," do we?

This is just like what happened in Season 2, Episode 4 of "Iron Host: The Animated Series"...! Just as you're about to give up on the protagonist who you thought could only fight one-on-one duels, he finally awakens his true power, and...

- Oh, man... That was a good watch. It was almost like we rented out a whole movie theater, wasn't it?
- There were bits I literally couldn't catch 'cause you kept howling right next to me, Papa... Eh, but that's basically every watch party with you.

- This is this ending they went with? It's so frickin' scuffed...! - Listen, Kiddo... There's somethin' about downer endings you can't get from— - Hello, Papa? Can you, like, not? We can't let them cook with this! Hey! That wasn't the end of the episode, right? Right?!

- Yo, Kiddo! C'mere, check this shit out!
- Huh? What is it?
- Papa's brought home—hup!—an exciting little homework project to work on together!
- Is that a mic...? No frickin' way... Am I making my pop idol debut?!
- ... What? No, it's nothing like that...
